'''Oweg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He commanded the [[Valiant (starship)|''Valiant'']].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Full Might of the Empire|book=Imperial Sourcebook|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
